distance_km.note: Search results show multiple distance options offered: 50 km, 25 km, 15 km, and 5 km on the first day (freestyle), and 50 km, 25 km, 15 km on the second day (classic style). The race is not a single fixed distance of 50 km.

elevation_m.note: No elevation gain data found in search results for the Ugra Ski Marathon course.

country.note: Confirmed as Russia in multiple sources.

region.note: Ugra (Khanty-Mansiysk) is located in Western Siberia, Russia.

discipline.note: The race includes both freestyle (first day) and classic style (second day) disciplines, not skate only.

typical_participants.note: Search results state 'Participation of over 4000 thousand participants is planned' (interpreting as 4000+ participants, not 2000).

year_founded.note: Confirmed that Ugra Ski Marathon has been held since 2013.

official_website.note: Search results do not provide the official website URL to verify or contradict the claimed URL.

typical_race_date.note: Search results do not specify the typical race date or month for the Ugra Ski Marathon.
